title: Lean Formalization of P≠NP Key Steps

analysis.object: T931: Lean Formalization of P≠NP Key Steps depth analysis

lean_t232.description: Lean: formalize T232 (depth = complexity correspondence). Polynomial-time = EML-2. PSPACE = EML-3. Undecidable = EML-inf. Anchor the bijection.

lean_kolmogorov.description: Lean: formalize Kolmogorov K uncomputability (Turing's theorem in Lean). This is already done in Mathlib (Halting problem formalization).
lean_kolmogorov.reason: Lean K uncomputability: Mathlib has it

lean_mcs_collapse.description: Lean: formalize P=NP implies MIN-CIRCUIT-SIZE in P. This is a 2-3 page argument in standard complexity. ~500 Lean lines.

lean_contradiction.description: Lean: formalize contradiction (K uncomputable + K computable = False). ~50 Lean lines using Mathlib.

lean_total_estimate.description: Total Lean estimate: T232 anchor (~2000 lines) + K uncomputability (Mathlib) + MCS collapse (~500) + contradiction (~50) = ~2600 new lines. Feasible in 1 year.

lean_barriers.description: Lean barriers: T232 formalization is new (no existing Lean). MCS collapse is informal in literature. Both need rigorous formalization. Doable but non-trivial.
lean_barriers.reason: Lean barriers: T232 and MCS need formalization

t931_theorem.description: T931: Lean formalization of P≠NP requires ~2600 new lines, primarily for T232 anchor and MCS collapse. Kolmogorov uncomputability is in Mathlib. Total feasibility: ~1 year with dedicated effort. T931.

analysis.theorem: T931: Lean Formalization of P≠NP Key Steps (S1211).

key_theorem: T931: Lean Formalization of P≠NP Key Steps (S1211).
